_comment: Converted from .kiro/hooks/. fileEdited/fileCreated/fileDeleted events NOT supported — see GAPS.md

PreToolUse.bash: echo 'REMINDER: If writing .drawio file, first call mem_search(drawio procedure) for patterns.'

PostToolUse.bash: echo 'If source file modified (.kt,.ts,.py,.go,.rs,.cs), run: npx ts-node .analysis/code-intelligence/scripts/src/incremental-indexer.ts --files <file>'

userPromptSubmitted.bash: echo 'Log user prompt summary via mem_ingest: type=CONTEXT, source=/chat-prompt, tags=chat,stream,user'

Stop.bash: echo 'Log agent response summary via mem_ingest: type=CONTEXT, source=chat-response, tags=chat,stream,agent'
